meta.siteTitle: Deepoda – Online Tools to Simplify Your Workflow
meta.siteDescription: Merge PDFs, compress images, remove backgrounds and more. In seconds, free, right in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

footer.tagline: Free online tool platform. All processing happens in your browser — data never leaves your device.
footer.copyright: Deepoda · All processing in your browser · GDPR compliant
footer.privacy: Your data never leaves your device.

home.badge: free tools · No server · Privacy guaranteed

hero.description: Edit PDFs, process images, convert files — all in seconds, completely free, without sending your data to any server.

search.placeholder: Search tools — merge PDF, remove background…

toolsSection.heading: All tools, one platform
toolsSection.description: tools, all free. Your files never leave your browser.

howItWorks.heading: Done in 3 steps
howItWorks.description: No sign-up, no software to install. Open your browser, get it done.

steps.title: Select Your File
steps.desc: Drag & drop or browse your folder. Multiple files at once supported.

steps.title: Tool Runs
steps.desc: Processing happens entirely in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.

steps.title: Download
steps.desc: Your file is ready instantly. No sign-up required.

whyDeepoda.heading: Why Deepoda?
whyDeepoda.description: Many online tools upload your files to their servers. Deepoda doesn't.

features.title: Full Privacy
features.desc: Your files are processed only in your browser. No server sees them, no logs are kept.

features.title: Instant Results
features.desc: Not dependent on internet speed. All processing runs on the power of your device.

features.title: Works Anywhere
features.desc: Mac, Windows, Linux, mobile — works from any device and any operating system.

cta.heading: Start now. No sign-up required.
cta.description: Thousands of people speed up their workflows with Deepoda every day.

meta.title: About
meta.description: What is Deepoda, what does it do, and why does it exist?

hero.description: Deepoda is a free tool platform that helps you complete everyday digital tasks in seconds instead of minutes.

cards.title: Mission
cards.desc: Provide fast, secure tools that anyone can use without technical knowledge.

cards.title: Values
cards.desc: Privacy is our top priority. Your files never leave your browser.

cards.title: Technology
cards.desc: Serverless architecture powered by WebAssembly, Canvas API, and modern libraries.

whyExist.heading: Why we exist
whyExist.p1: Having to install an app just to merge a PDF, upload files to ad-filled websites to compress an image, or create an account just to convert a format — these are unnecessary time sinks.
whyExist.p2: Deepoda was designed to solve exactly this. All our tools run in the browser; your files are never sent to a server. This keeps you secure and makes the whole process significantly faster.

howSustain.heading: How we sustain this
howSustain.p1: Core tools will stay free forever. The platform finances itself through an optional Pro plan for advanced features and Google AdSense.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.description: Fill out the form for suggestions, bug reports, or collaboration inquiries.

cards.title: Bug Report
cards.desc: Found an issue? Let us know.

notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
